commitMessage:
fix(mobile/faq): improve expand/collapse UX

- Increase expanded answer container height to min(70vh, 560px) with inner scroll area for long content
- Replace text arrow with SVG chevron for universal visibility across iOS Safari, Chrome, Firefox, Samsung Internet, Edge
- Add modern 240ms cubic-bezier rotation animation using GPU-friendly transforms (60fps target)
- Preserve glassmorphism, spacing, ARIA attributes, and 44px touch targets
